en: This is how one should regard us, as servants of Christ and stewards of the mysteries of God.
zh: 這樣，人應該把我們看作基督的僕人， 神奧祕的事的管家。

en: Moreover, it is required of stewards that they be found trustworthy.
zh: 對於管家的要求，就是要他忠心。

en: But with me it is a very small thing that I should be judged by you or by any human court. In fact, I do not even judge myself.
zh: 我被你們論斷，或被人間法庭審判，我都認為是極小的事，連我自己也不論斷自己。

en: I am not aware of anything against myself, but I am not thereby acquitted. It is the Lord who judges me.
zh: 我雖然問心無愧，卻不能因此自以為義，因為判斷我的是主。

en: Therefore do not pronounce judgment before the time, before the Lord comes, who will bring to light the things now hidden in darkness and will disclose the purposes of the heart. Then each one will receive his commendation from God.
zh: 所以時候還沒有到，你們不要批評，直等到主來；他要照出黑暗中的隱情，顯明人心裡的動機。那時，各人要從 神那裡得著稱讚。

en: I have applied all these things to myself and Apollos for your benefit, brothers, that you may learn by us not to go beyond what is written, that none of you may be puffed up in favor of one against another.
zh: 弟兄們，我為你們的緣故，拿了這些事來比擬自己和亞波羅，讓你們在我們身上學到的，不會超過聖經所記的，免得你們中間有人自高自大，看重這個輕視那個。

en: For who sees anything different in you? What do you have that you did not receive? If then you received it, why do you boast as if you did not receive it?
zh: 使你與人不同的是誰呢？你有甚麼不是領受的呢？既然是領受的，為甚麼要自誇，好像不是領受的呢？

en: Already you have all you want! Already you have become rich! Without us you have become kings! And would that you did reign, so that we might share the rule with you!
zh: 你們已經滿足了，已經豐富了，不需要我們，自己作王了。我恨不得你們真的作了王，讓我們也可以跟你們一同作王！

en: For I think that God has exhibited us apostles as last of all, like men sentenced to death, because we have become a spectacle to the world, to angels, and to men.
zh: 我想 神是把我們作使徒的列在最後，好像定了死刑的人，因為我們成了一臺戲給宇宙觀看，就是給天使和世人觀看！

en: We are fools for Christ's sake, but you are wise in Christ. We are weak, but you are strong. You are held in honor, but we in disrepute.
zh: 我們為基督的緣故，成了愚笨的；你們在基督裡，倒成了聰明的。我們軟弱，你們倒強壯；你們受人尊敬，我們倒被輕視。

en: To the present hour we hunger and thirst, we are poorly dressed and buffeted and homeless,
zh: 直到現在，我們還是又飢又渴，衣不蔽體，又挨打，又沒有棲身的地方，

en: and we labor, working with our own hands. When reviled, we bless; when persecuted, we endure;
zh: 並且勞苦，親手作工。被人咒罵，我們就祝福；遭受迫害，我們就忍受；

en: when slandered, we entreat. We have become, and are still, like the scum of the world, the refuse of all things.
zh: 被人毀謗，我們卻好好地勸導；直到現在，人還是把我們當作世上的垃圾，萬物的渣滓。

en: I do not write these things to make you ashamed, but to admonish you as my beloved children.
zh: 我寫這些話，不是要叫你們羞愧，而是把你們當作我親愛的兒女一樣勸戒你們。

en: For though you have countless guides in Christ, you do not have many fathers. For I became your father in Christ Jesus through the gospel.
zh: 縱然你們在基督裡有上萬的啟蒙教師，可是父親卻不多，因為是我在基督耶穌裡藉著福音生了你們。

en: I urge you, then, be imitators of me.
zh: 所以我勸你們要效法我。

en: That is why I sent you Timothy, my beloved and faithful child in the Lord, to remind you of my ways in Christ, as I teach them everywhere in every church.
zh: 因此，我打發提摩太到你們那裡去。他是我在主裡親愛又忠心的兒子，他要提醒你們我在基督裡是怎樣行事為人，正如我在各處教會中所教導的一樣。

en: Some are arrogant, as though I were not coming to you.
zh: 有人以為我不會到你們那裡去，就自高自大。

en: But I will come to you soon, if the Lord wills, and I will find out not the talk of these arrogant people but their power.
zh: 然而主若願意，我很快就要到你們那裡去；到時我要知道的，不是那些自高自大的人所講的，而是他們的能力。

en: For the kingdom of God does not consist in talk but in power.
zh: 因為 神的國不在乎言語，而在乎權能。

en: What do you wish? Shall I come to you with a rod, or with love in a spirit of gentleness?
zh: 你們願意怎麼樣呢？要我帶著刑杖到你們那裡去，還是以溫柔的靈，帶著愛心去呢？
